hyperedges.label: YOLOv8 Fine-Tune Workflow (dataset -> YOLO format -> train -> TRT export)

nodes.label: CPU-vs-GPU benchmark for the report.  Runs the detector on the same video twice:
nodes.norm_label: cpu-vs-gpu benchmark for the report.  runs the detector on the same video twice:

nodes.label: Entry point.  Examples:     python demo.py --source video.mp4     python demo.py
nodes.norm_label: entry point.  examples:     python demo.py --source video.mp4     python demo.py

nodes.label: CPU demo with high-recall settings + bbox persistence for smooth output.
nodes.norm_label: cpu demo with high-recall settings + bbox persistence for smooth output.

nodes.label: Optional: fine-tune YOLOv8 on dog-only datasets.  Not required for the default p
nodes.norm_label: optional: fine-tune yolov8 on dog-only datasets.  not required for the default p

nodes.label: Preallocated CuPy ring buffer for per-detection rows.  Avoids per-frame cuDF con
nodes.norm_label: preallocated cupy ring buffer for per-detection rows.  avoids per-frame cudf con

nodes.label: Column-oriented ring on GPU. O(1) append per row.
nodes.norm_label: column-oriented ring on gpu. o(1) append per row.

nodes.label: Return the ring unrolled into chronological order.
nodes.norm_label: return the ring unrolled into chronological order.

nodes.label: GPU color-histogram per ROI using CuPy.  Crops each detection from the frame on-
nodes.norm_label: gpu color-histogram per roi using cupy.  crops each detection from the frame on-

nodes.label: Minimal BGR→HSV on GPU. Matches cv2.COLOR_BGR2HSV semantics approximately.
nodes.norm_label: minimal bgr→hsv on gpu. matches cv2.color_bgr2hsv semantics approximately.

nodes.label: Return an (N, bins**3) float32 array of normalized HSV histograms on CPU.      K
nodes.norm_label: return an (n, bins**3) float32 array of normalized hsv histograms on cpu.      k

nodes.label: cuDF rolling-window aggregates over the DetectionRing snapshot.
nodes.norm_label: cudf rolling-window aggregates over the detectionring snapshot.

nodes.label: YOLOv8 dog detector with optional TensorRT FP16 engine.  Uses Ultralytics' built
nodes.norm_label: yolov8 dog detector with optional tensorrt fp16 engine.  uses ultralytics' built

nodes.label: Load PyTorch weights; export to TensorRT FP16 and reload if requested.
nodes.norm_label: load pytorch weights; export to tensorrt fp16 and reload if requested.

nodes.label: Run detect+track on a single BGR frame. Returns dog-only detections.
nodes.norm_label: run detect+track on a single bgr frame. returns dog-only detections.

nodes.label: Detection without tracking — used by the CPU/GPU benchmark.
nodes.norm_label: detection without tracking — used by the cpu/gpu benchmark.

nodes.label: Threaded pipeline: decode → inference+track → analytics → display/write.  v1 run
nodes.norm_label: threaded pipeline: decode → inference+track → analytics → display/write.  v1 run

nodes.label: Thin wrapper that keeps trajectories per track_id.  Ultralytics handles ByteTrac
nodes.norm_label: thin wrapper that keeps trajectories per track_id.  ultralytics handles bytetrac

nodes.label: Deterministic color for a tracker ID. Same ID → same color every run.
nodes.norm_label: deterministic color for a tracker id. same id → same color every run.

nodes.label: Draw bbox + track_id + conf on a BGR frame. Returns the same frame.
nodes.norm_label: draw bbox + track_id + conf on a bgr frame. returns the same frame.

nodes.label: Video IO: local files via cv2.VideoCapture, webcam via integer index.  Includes
nodes.norm_label: video io: local files via cv2.videocapture, webcam via integer index.  includes

nodes.label: Yield (bgr_frame, meta). Reconnects on read-failure for live sources.
nodes.norm_label: yield (bgr_frame, meta). reconnects on read-failure for live sources.

nodes.label: Lazy VideoWriter — initialized on first frame so we know size/fps.
nodes.norm_label: lazy videowriter — initialized on first frame so we know size/fps.

nodes.label: Rationale: CuPy Ring Buffer for O(1) Append
nodes.norm_label: rationale: cupy ring buffer for o(1) append

nodes.label: Rationale: Drop-Oldest Queue Policy for Real-Time
nodes.norm_label: rationale: drop-oldest queue policy for real-time

nodes.label: Rationale: TensorRT FP16 Primary, PyTorch FP16 Fallback
nodes.norm_label: rationale: tensorrt fp16 primary, pytorch fp16 fallback

nodes.label: Out of Scope (v1) - breed, pose, multi-class
nodes.norm_label: out of scope (v1) - breed, pose, multi-class

nodes.label: Rationale: WSL2 Required Because cuDF is Linux-only
nodes.norm_label: rationale: wsl2 required because cudf is linux-only
